overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark cave system at night while holding a lit torch. The player walks along a dirt path through narrow rocky corridors before emerging into an open canyon area and entering a shallow body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky cave corridor with dense vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow dark cave path while holding a torch to illuminate the way

entered.detail: wooden torch with bright flame held in the left hand, providing primary illumination
uneven dirt and gravel trail winding through the cave
tall rocky cave wall with rough texture
tall rocky cave wall flanking the right side of the path
clusters of green ferns growing at the base of the rock walls

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dark cave corridor illuminated only by the torch in their hand. Rocky walls flank both sides with green ferns growing at the base, while the dirt path winds forward into the darkness.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky canyon with tall cliff faces

events.description: exits narrow cave corridor into open canyon area with visible rock cliffs in the distance
approaching a body of water visible ahead in the torchlight

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward as the environment opens up to reveal a vast rocky canyon with distant cliffs

entered.detail: large illuminated rock face and cliff formation visible in the distance against the night sky
loose rocks and boulders littering the ground near the path

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow cave into a more open canyon area. Tall rock cliffs become visible in the distance against the night sky, while the ground remains a dirt trail with scattered rocks. The torch continues to provide the primary illumination as the player advances toward a body of water.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow water pool in rocky canyon

events.description: steps from dry ground into shallow water, creating ripples in the pool
walking speed slows slightly while wading through the water

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water while holding the torch aloft to illuminate the rippling surface ahead

entered.detail: calm reflective water that the player is walking through, creating ripples with each step
rocky edge of the water pool visible to the left

segments.scene_description: The player enters a shallow body of water, transitioning from the dirt path to wading through the pool. The torchlight reflects off the rippling water surface, revealing submerged rocks beneath. The rocky canyon walls continue to surround the area as the player moves deeper into the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the claustrophobic depths of a dark cave into the open expanse of a moonlit canyon. It begins by winding through a narrow rocky corridor where a handheld torch illuminates green ferns clinging to the damp walls. As the path forward opens up, the camera emerges from the cave into a wider canyon area, revealing towering rock cliffs set against the night sky. The scene then shifts from the dry dirt trail to a shallow pool of water, with the torchlight beginning to ripple and reflect across the surface. Finally, the camera wades deeper into the water, revealing submerged rocks while the surrounding canyon walls frame the dark landscape.
